## Excerpt (first 6 000 chars, docx)

__Date:__ 17th  March 2026

__Ref: Speaker Invitation – *AI Tech Forum 2026*, MontClair Hotel, Nyanga, Zimbabwe__

Dear \[Name\],

We are pleased to invite you to speak at the AI Tech Forum 2026, taking place 27–28 May 2026 at MontClair Hotel, Nyanga\.

Hosted by the Artificial Intelligence Institute Africa \(AIIA\) in partnership with Zimpapers, the forum will bring together regional and international experts under the theme:

*“Engineering the Future: Mastering Next\-Generation AI Systems in Practice at Scale\.”*

We would be honored if you could present on “AI, Culture, Language & Indigenous Knowledge\.” You are welcome to refine the topic to align with your expertise\.

The Zimbabwe 2\.0: AI for National Transformation Summit will follow at the same venue on 28–29 May 2026, enabling delegates to participate in both events\.

Your hotel accommodation, meals, and fuel costs will be covered, and a summit bus from Harare will be available as a transport option\. Please find the conference concept note and program attached for your review\.

For further information, please contact:  
AI Institute Africa  :  \+263 78 693 7025  
Mica Zinduru :  \+263 77 233 1156

We look forward to your participation in what promises to be a landmark conversation on AI and national development\.

Yours Sincerely,
